notes: Skill produces 100% pass rate vs 60% baseline — consistent across all three test pages
The 2 failing baseline assertions are always the same: no Critical/Fact-Check tier separation, and no fix-application workflow — these are the structural behaviours the skill uniquely provides
Error detection rate is identical in both configurations (both find the injected errors); the skill's value is in structure, source recommendations, and the resolve workflow
MOSFETs baseline produced a false positive on P-channel body diode direction — the skill's calibration table prevented this
Time overhead is negligible: with-skill 77s vs without-skill 79s average
Token overhead is modest: ~2300 tokens more with skill, for structured output and source recommendations
